name: com.memxus/memxus
title: Memxus
description: Multi-platform AI memory for individuals, groups and teams. One save, recall everywhere.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Save a memory with optional collection, tags, type, importance and visibility (private or shared with a group)

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Semantically search long-term memory by topic or keyword and return ranked results

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Build a formatted context block for the current topic — ideal for injecting relevant memory into agent prompts

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: List recent memories with optional filters by collection, tags, type or visibility

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Get the full content of a single memory by its UUID

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List all memory collections and scopes for the current user

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a specific memory by ID

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: Show statistics about stored memories by type and collection

screenshots.description: Memxus memory layer — save once, recall everywhere
